items.fromString:
*Reproduce Steps:*

POD 32Z4101080010651 participates in contract МПОК-2112000371 (terminated) for the customer with identifier 7501091095, where we have two unpaid liabilities with expired due dates: Liability-153387 and Liability-110944.

It also participates in contract EPES2603000418 (active) for the customer with identifier 6205111469, where we have one unpaid liability with an expired due date: Liability-195210 (which is currently paid).

A Reminder for Disconnection was created:
[https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/reminder-for-disconnection/preview/general-settings?id=1015|https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/reminder-for-disconnection/preview/general-settings?id=1015]

The reminder contains two rows:

* One row for customer 7501091095 with liabilities Liability-153387 and Liability-110944.
* One row for customer 6205111469 with liability Liability-195210.

In the Request for Disconnection:
[https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/request-for-disconnection/preview/basic-parameters?id=1066|https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/request-for-disconnection/preview/basic-parameters?id=1066] there is only one row for customer 6205111469, but it includes both contracts and their liabilities. This is not correct.

*Actual Result:*

As a result  - we have a payment for Liability-195210, but in cancellation customer 6205111469 are included without a check:





*Expected Result:*

We should have 2 separate rows for each of the customers in the request for disconnection and when the liabilities for some of them are paid, this customer should we included in the cancellation request with a check.

NOTE: Maybe this problem will be fixed when [https://oppa-support.atlassian.net/browse/PDT-2957|https://oppa-support.atlassian.net/browse/PDT-2957|smart-link]  is done, but please keep it in mind.

_________________

items.toString:
*Reproduce Steps:*

POD 32Z4101080010651 participates in contract МПОК-2112000371 (terminated) for the customer with identifier 7501091095, where we have two unpaid liabilities with expired due dates: Liability-153387 and Liability-110944.

It also participates in contract EPES2603000418 (active) for the customer with identifier 6205111469, where we have one unpaid liability with an expired due date: Liability-195210 (which is currently paid).

A Reminder for Disconnection was created:
[https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/reminder-for-disconnection/preview/general-settings?id=1015|https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/reminder-for-disconnection/preview/general-settings?id=1015]

The reminder contains two rows:

* One row for customer 7501091095 with liabilities Liability-153387 and Liability-110944.
* One row for customer 6205111469 with liability Liability-195210.

In the Request for Disconnection:
[https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/request-for-disconnection/preview/basic-parameters?id=1066|https://apps.energo-pro.bg/phoenix-epres/request-for-disconnection/preview/basic-parameters?id=1066] there is only one row for customer 6205111469, but it includes both contracts and their liabilities. This is not correct.

!image-20260611-142547.png|width=924,alt="image-20260611-142547.png"!



*Actual Result:*

As a result  - we have a payment for Liability-195210, but in cancellation customer 6205111469 are included without a check:

!image-20260611-142557.png|width=924,alt="image-20260611-142557.png"!





*Expected Result:*

We should have 2 separate rows for each of the customers in the request for disconnection and when the liabilities for some of them are paid, this customer should we included in the cancellation request with a check.

NOTE: Maybe this problem will be fixed when [https://oppa-support.atlassian.net/browse/PDT-2957|https://oppa-support.atlassian.net/browse/PDT-2957|smart-link]  is done, but please keep it in mind.

_________________

fields.summary: Request for disconnection - a POD with 2 contracts for different customers is listed on 1 row

content.text: POD 32Z4101080010651 participates in contract МПОК-2112000371 (terminated) for the customer with identifier 7501091095, where we have two unpaid liabilities with expired due dates: Liability-153387 and Liability-110944.

It also participates in contract EPES2603000418 (active) for the customer with identifier 6205111469, where we have one unpaid liability with an expired due date: Liability-195210 (which is currently paid).
A Reminder for Disconnection was created:
One row for customer 7501091095 with liabilities Liability-153387 and Liability-110944.
One row for customer 6205111469 with liability Liability-195210.
there is only one row for customer 6205111469, but it includes both contracts and their liabilities. This is not correct.
As a result  - we have a payment for Liability-195210, but in cancellation customer 6205111469 are included without a check:

We should have 2 separate rows for each of the customers in the request for disconnection and when the liabilities for some of them are paid, this customer should we included in the cancellation request with a check.
NOTE: Maybe this problem will be fixed when
is done, but please keep it in mind.
